case_title: GARBINI, FABIO VS 1635 CALIFORNIA GARAGE OWNER RAMON C. GAYLES.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY GARBINI, FABIO AS TO DEFENDANT 1635 CALIFORNIA GARAGE OWNER RAMON C. GAYLES. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-03-2002 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CERT MAIL SENT TO 1635 CALIFORNIA GARAGE RETURNED SIGNED
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT 1635 CALIFORNIA GARAGE OWNER RAMON C. GAYLES.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GARBINI, FABIO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT 1635 CALIFORNIA GARAGE OWNER RAMON C. GAYLES. $700.00 PRINCIPAL, $28.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $728.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $43.20 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT 1635 CALIFORNIA GARAGE OWNER RAMON C. GAYLES.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT 1635 CALIFORNIA GARAGE OWNER RAMON C. GAYLES.
